_comment: Claude Desktop MCP configuration for Garmin AI Coach. Copy the relevant block into ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
_modes: stdio = local machine only (no auth needed) | sse = local network (auth token required)

_option_A_stdio_local._comment: Use when Claude Desktop runs on the SAME machine as the coach Docker stack

garmin-ai-coach._comment: Use when connecting from any machine on your LAN. Replace YOUR_SERVER_IP and YOUR_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN.
